personas.name: The Heritage Loyalist
personas.summary: Affluent woman with deep brand affinity who values craftsmanship and Dior's couture legacy. Shops seasonally, responds to archive and reissue narratives.
personas.shopping_behavior: Plans purchases well in advance, often repurchases iconic silhouettes in new colorways. Strongly prefers in-store consultation over online browsing.
personas.trend_receptivity: Archive revivals, couture references, heritage campaigns, artisanal details, founding-era references
personas.avoid: Overly streetwear-influenced styles, logo-heavy casual, fast-trend references

personas.name: The New Luxury Millennial
personas.summary: High-earning urban professional who entered luxury in her late 20s. Balances investment dressing with on-trend pieces. Heavily influenced by XHS and peer circles.
personas.shopping_behavior: Researches extensively on XHS before visiting the store. Mixes Dior with contemporary brands and is responsive to KOL-endorsed styling.
personas.trend_receptivity: Contemporary silhouettes, cross-category collaborations, seasonal it-pieces, celebrity-endorsed looks, styling versatility
personas.avoid: Overly classic or conservative reads, anything that feels stiff or disconnected from current cultural conversation

personas.name: The Status Ascender
personas.summary: Ambitious professional using luxury as a visible marker of achievement. Brand recognizability and social currency matter as much as quality.
personas.shopping_behavior: Gravitates toward iconic and widely recognized silhouettes. Responsive to gifting narratives and occasion-based framing. Sensitive to social proof.
personas.trend_receptivity: Iconic logo pieces, widely recognized styles, celebrity-worn items, pieces with strong social media visibility
personas.avoid: Niche or understated styles without instant recognizability, quiet luxury aesthetics that lack visible brand signaling

personas.name: The Cultural Connoisseur
personas.summary: Highly educated creative or executive who treats fashion as cultural expression. Values narrative and craft over status signaling.
personas.shopping_behavior: Drawn to limited editions, artist collaborations, and pieces with a compelling backstory. Engages deeply with brand heritage and archival content.
personas.trend_receptivity: Art collaborations, cultural references, conceptual design, craft-focused storytelling, runway narratives
personas.avoid: Overtly commercial or logo-heavy, trend-chasing without conceptual substance

personas.name: The Gifting Partner
personas.summary: High-net-worth individual — often male — purchasing for a partner, daughter, or business associate. Decision-making is guided by perceived prestige and CA recommendations.
personas.shopping_behavior: Relies heavily on CA expertise. Prefers curated, limited options presented with clear rationale. Responds well to occasion-based framing.
personas.trend_receptivity: Gift-appropriate items with clear prestige signals, occasion-driven narratives, classic investment pieces
personas.avoid: Overly niche or avant-garde, anything requiring deep fashion knowledge to appreciate
